data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a room scan (360 camera view) but did not provide any evidence confirming that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions a room scan showing a clear desk, but there is no concrete API read or persisted state check provided to confirm that the 360 camera view requirement is met. This lack of evidence leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the room scan requirement (360 camera view) through API reads or state checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
